notes: SHIP v1.14.333 - Rack reads SOLID: opaque trays + opaque back panel (HANDOFF-REH3D-GEOMETRY 2a + 2c; owner UNLOCKED the RACK SCENE LOCK for the geometry overhaul, 2026-07-22). This ships the two REAL, on-live-data material fixes; the additive Max-detail geometry (2d-2i) is deferred to a reconciliation pass (.334) - see OODA below. 2a OPAQUE TRAYS (the handoff's 'biggest single fix'): chMat was transparent:true/opacity:0.92 - 8% transparency nobody perceives, but it put all ~42 chassis into Three's transparent render queue, which re-sorts by centroid every frame; during orbit the sort flips and trays pop in front of each other (the 'looks bad when it turns' defect). Now transparent:false = stable opaque sort, no pop. Type-colour (color/emissive) untouched = .256 lock intact. 2c OPAQUE BACK PANEL (DEVIATED from the handoff, rd-review catch): backMat was transparent:0.85 + DoubleSide - the bleed-through was a transparent-queue depth-sort artifact. FIX = transparent:false ALONE (opaque queue = correct depth test, trays occlude the wall). The handoff also said side:FrontSide, but this back panel is an UNROTATED PlaneGeometry whose front normal is +Z; FrontSide would cull it from the rear camera, vanishing the back wall for ~1/3 of every orbit (worst in the REAR preset). So DoubleSide is KEPT (solid wall from all angles). Only transparent:false changed. ⚠OODA DIVERGENCES found vs the handoff (why 2b/2d/2j are NOT in this ship): (1) 2b 'solid blanking plates' targets the kind==='blank' branch, which live code marks 'unreached on current Masters' (master_hostType never outputs 'blank'; undeclared U render as rails+perforation, not a blank panel) - the see-through-blanking defect the handoff describes does NOT exist on real data, so editing it is dead-code churn. (2) 2d 'add front mounting rails' - live code ALREADY has 'MOUNTING RAILS + EIA-310 PERFORATION (NEW geometry, John-approved 2026-07-15/.260)'; blindly adding rails would DUPLICATE existing geometry. (3) 2j 'drop the 1px edge lines' - those edgeMat LineSegments are on the STRUCTURE FRAME (posts), not per-tray, and dropping them removes edge definition unless 2e's chamfers replace it (coupled). These three, plus the rest of the additive detail (2e chamfers, 2f vents/handles/LEDs, 2g side panels, 2h bezel-move+glow, 2i contact shadow) need a careful reconcile against the live .260 scene, not a blind apply = .334. LOCK CATEGORIES STILL RESPECTED by THIS ship: only tray + back-panel material transparency flipped; NO change to lights/exposure/env/fog/tone-mapping, NO change to type-colour VALUES (.256), NO geometry added/removed, NO floor change. CONTRACTS preserved: .255 tap (trayMeshes raycast unchanged), EXPLODE (trayGroups unchanged), U-map, dispose registry (no new textures). Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, sw.js ok, version.json valid, CSS brace net-0, three-stamp .332->.333 lockstep; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA, hard-refresh first): open a rack in 3D (Rack Elevation panel OR the Command hero) and SPIN a full revolution - trays no longer pop/flicker in front of each other; rack reads solid, not see-through; back wall no longer bleeds through the trays; tray colours unchanged (.256); tap a tray still opens its contents (.255); EXPLODE still extends trays. ROLLBACK: revert this commit (restores transparent:0.92 trays + transparent:0.85 DoubleSide back).
